parsed.summary: This page is a Daikin VRV fault code guide. It visually categorizes fault codes into indoor unit, outdoor unit, and system faults, and provides detailed troubleshooting for code A3 (condensate water level abnormal).

visual_entities.label: Title: 大金 VRV 根据故障代码（排除故障方法）
Troubleshooting table for fault code A3
Footer: DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI

visual_relationships.from: Troubleshooting table for fault code A3

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
大金 VRV 根据故障代码（排除故障方法）
故障代码说明
室内机常见故障
A3 A5 A6 C4
室外机常见故障
E3 E5 F3 L5
系统常见故障
U1 U2 U4 U7
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
1.1室内机常见故障
故障代码：A3（冷凝水位异常）
判断条件：非水位上升时，浮子开关处于关闭
原因对策：
排水配管堵塞 ——疏通管道（用户）
排水管施工错误 ——改善安装（安装）
排水泵不良 ——更换部品（维修）
浮子开关不良 ——更换部品（维修）
室内机电路板不良 ——更换部品（维修）
短路连接端不良 ——设定确认（维修）
注：没有提升泵时应将X15A短接
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The exact meaning of some Chinese terms (e.g., '短路连接端不良') may require domain-specific translation. The visual layout clearly shows categorization, but the full context of all fault codes is not detailed on this page.

parsed.summary: This page displays two fault code tables from a Daikin HVAC manual, detailing common faults for outdoor units and system faults. Each table includes a fault code, judgment condition, causes, and corresponding remedies.

visual_entities.label: Fault Code U1 (Reverse Phase, Open Phase)
Causes and Remedies for Fault U1

visual_relationships.to: Microcomputer detects compressor output current overload 16 times
Reverse phase monitor detects power phase loss or reverse phase
Causes and Remedies for Fault U1
Check wiring carefully to avoid component damage

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
1.2室外机常见故障
故障代码: 15 (压缩机输出电流过载)
判断条件: 微机检测到压缩机输出过电流16次
原因对策:
> 截止阀关闭导致过电流 ——检查系统(安装)
> 电源电压异常导致过电流 ——检查电源(维修)
> 电源晶体管故障导致过流 ——更换部品(维修)
> 内部接线故障导致过流 ——检查线路(维修)
> 电脑板故障导致过电流 ——更换部品(维修)
> 压缩机故障导致过电流 ——更换部品(维修)
相关信息:
有些情况下内部接线错误会导致过电流，请仔细检查接线以免再次损坏部件
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
1.3系统常见故障
故障代码: U1 (反相、开相)
判断条件: 反相监测器检测到电源缺相或反相
原因对策:
> 电源反相 ——检查电源(安装)
> 电源开相 ——检查电源(安装)
> 电源端子部插件接触不良 ——检查线路(维修)
> 室外机电脑板不良 ——更换部品(维修)
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The OCR text is clear and matches the visual content. No significant uncertainties in the relationships or entities. The page is a straightforward fault code table.

parsed.summary: This page is a visual guide from a Daikin HVAC manual, showing procedures for viewing historical fault codes and confirming fault codes using a wireless remote. It includes annotated images of control panels and a remote control, with step-by-step instructions in Chinese.

visual_entities.label: Press TEST key for 4 seconds or more

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
查看历史故障代码
保存10次历史故障
按此键翻看
正常模式
按TEST键4秒以上
设定模式
按TEST键4秒以上
维修模式
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
2.2使用无线遥控器确认故障代码
2.2.1 家用机
2.2.1.1风灵/EMAX/多联机
FTX25/35L
FTX56A
FTXD56/68C
FTXD25/35/60/71D
CDXD FDXD
指示灯
开/关按钮

运转指示灯(绿)
智能眼指示灯(绿)
出现故障时运转灯闪烁
